title: TokenPak Proxy Configuration Schema
description: Configuration schema for TokenPak proxy server. All values can be overridden by TOKENPAK_* environment variables.

port.title: Proxy Listen Port
port.description: HTTP port for proxy server. Must be unprivileged (1024-65535).

mode.title: Compilation Mode
mode.description: Token compression aggressiveness: strict (minimal), hybrid (balanced), aggressive (maximum).

db.title: Monitor Database Path
db.description: Path to SQLite monitor database. If null, monitoring is disabled.

enabled.title: Compression Enabled
enabled.description: Master on/off switch for token compression.

max_chars.title: Max Compressed Text Length
max_chars.description: Maximum character length for compressed text blocks.

threshold_tokens.title: Compression Threshold
threshold_tokens.description: Minimum input tokens to trigger compression pipeline.

cache_size.title: Compression Cache Size
cache_size.description: Max number of compressed entries to cache in memory.

skeleton.title: Skeleton Extraction
skeleton.description: Extract document structure (headings, lists) for compression.

router.title: Provider Router
router.description: Route requests to optimal providers based on model/cost.

validation_gate.title: Validation Gate
validation_gate.description: Validate request format and completeness before forwarding.

validation_gate_soft.title: Soft Validation (Warning Mode)
validation_gate_soft.description: Log validation errors without blocking requests.

capsule_builder.title: Capsule Builder
capsule_builder.description: Wrap responses in structured capsule format.

term_resolver.title: Term Resolver
term_resolver.description: Resolve undefined terms using semantic search.

chat_footer.title: Chat Footer
chat_footer.description: Append stats/metadata footer to chat responses.

semantic_cache.title: Semantic Cache
semantic_cache.description: Cache responses by semantic similarity (not exact match).

prefix_registry.title: Prefix Registry
prefix_registry.description: Track and optimize common prompt prefixes.

compression_dict.title: Compression Dictionary
compression_dict.description: Use custom compression dictionary for domain-specific terms.

strict_mode.title: Strict Mode
strict_mode.description: Fail requests instead of degrading on validation errors.

budget_controller.title: Budget Controller
budget_controller.description: Track and enforce token budgets across models.

request_logger.title: Request Logger
request_logger.description: Log all requests to file (high disk usage).

salience_router.title: Salience Router
salience_router.description: Route based on request importance/salience scoring.

retrieval_watchdog.title: Retrieval Watchdog
retrieval_watchdog.description: Monitor and log vault retrieval performance.

failure_memory.title: Failure Memory
failure_memory.description: Remember and learn from past failures.

session_capsules.title: Session Capsules
session_capsules.description: Package multi-turn sessions in capsule format.

stability_scorer.title: Stability Scorer
stability_scorer.description: Score request stability and route accordingly.

total_tokens.title: Total Token Budget
total_tokens.description: Total tokens allowed per billing cycle.

validation_gate_cap.title: Validation Gate Budget Cap
validation_gate_cap.description: Maximum tokens for validation gate operations.

min_chars.title: Minimum Characters for Capsule
min_chars.description: Minimum response length to trigger capsule wrapping.

hot_window.title: Hot Window (hours)
hot_window.description: Time window for tracking 'hot' (frequently accessed) capsules.

vault.title: Vault / Knowledge Injection Settings
vault.description: Configure vault integration for prompt injection.

inject_budget.title: Injection Budget (tokens)
inject_budget.description: Maximum tokens to inject from vault per request.

inject_top_k.title: Top-K Blocks to Inject
inject_top_k.description: Maximum number of vault blocks to include per injection.

inject_min_score.title: Minimum Injection Score
inject_min_score.description: Only inject blocks with relevance score >= this threshold.

inject_skip_models.title: Skip Injection for Models
inject_skip_models.description: Comma-separated list of models to skip vault injection (e.g., 'haiku,claude-3-5-haiku').

inject_min_prompt.title: Minimum Prompt Length for Injection
inject_min_prompt.description: Only inject if prompt is >= this length (characters).

retrieval_backend.title: Vault Retrieval Backend
retrieval_backend.description: Backend for retrieving vault blocks: json_blocks or sqlite.

top_k.title: Top-K Terms
top_k.description: Number of candidate terms to retrieve.

max_bytes.title: Max Definition Bytes
max_bytes.description: Maximum length of term definition in bytes.

upstream.title: Upstream Provider Settings
upstream.description: Configuration for upstream providers (LLMs, local models).

timeout.title: Default Upstream Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Default timeout for upstream provider requests.

ollama.title: Ollama Upstream URL
ollama.description: URL for local Ollama instance (if using Ollama backend).

rate_limit_rpm.title: Rate Limit (requests per minute)
rate_limit_rpm.description: Global rate limit in requests per minute.

enabled.title: Failover Enabled
enabled.description: Enable automatic failover to backup providers.

chain.title: Failover Chain
chain.description: Ordered list of providers to try on failure.

provider.title: Provider Name
provider.description: Name of upstream provider (anthropic, openai, google, etc).

credential_env.title: Credential Environment Variable
credential_env.description: Env var name containing API key for this provider.

model_map.title: Model Name Mapping
model_map.description: Map source model names to target provider equivalents.
